text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 4 

ACUTE_PERDIEM_PMT 

LABEL: Acute Inpatient Hospital Pass-thru Per Diem Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of all the pass through per diem payment amounts 
(CLM_PASS_THRU_PER_DIEM_AMT from each claim) in the acute inpatient hospital setting for the year. 
Medicare payments are designed to include certain "pass-through" expenses such as capital-related 
costs,
